title: conyza monocephala
intro: Conyza monocephala, also known as one-headed fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Conyza monocephala include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Conyza monocephala can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
